decisions.rationale: IR re-read (ir/inventory.json) confirms ai_RNbBHYXv parent_id is ai_RNbBHYXl (security-form), not ai_RNbBHYXh (security-form-card); SettingsSecurityTab mounts the actions row as a card-level sibling after the form div closes. Valid hierarchy gap on a named decompose ui_ref, but review ui_evidence passes on ai_RNbBHYXv (marker present) and criteria_audit AC-1 passes — AC-1 gates data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHYXh, ai_RNbBHYXl, and ai_RNbBHYXv, not parent-child nesting. Functional audit FV-1..FV-4 and AC-2/AC-3 pass; no module item lists SET-05 in depends_on. Footer layout (border-t, flex gap) is visually correct; ~6-line nest of SECURITY_ACTIONS_ROW_BUBBLE_ID inside the SECURITY_FORM_BUBBLE_ID wrapper batchable with SET-06 C-2 settings IR hierarchy polish — defer to SET-05 hierarchy polish wave.

Coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-fix failures (missing ai_RNbBHYXv marker, wrong reset redirect, no signInWithPassword reauth, generic copy) although criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3, functional_verification FV-1..FV-4, review criteria_audit, and review ui_evidence now pass on all markers, reauth, redirect, and Bubble copy. Coverage-artifact hygiene only — mirrors SET-04 C-4 and SET-06 C-3 deferrals. Refresh cursor-impl-cycle/output/coverage/SET-05-security-tab-and-password-flow.json preflight.gaps on the next coverage pass so re-review diffs stay readable.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 nest ai_RNbBHYXv actions row under ai_RNbBHYXl per IR parent_id (SET-05/SET-06 settings IR hierarchy polish batch); C-2 stale coverage preflight.gaps (refresh on next coverage run). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
